Leslie Liu

I build applied machine learning systems that connect modeling, data workflows, and user-facing product experiences. My background blends scientific computing, process engineering, experimentation, and hands-on software delivery.

Selected Work

Projects with technical depth and clear product intent

A cleaner first look at the work that best represents my mix of machine learning, systems thinking, and applied experimentation.

Hackathon • Multi-agent AI

BigScore

A crypto reliability scoring platform that combines multi-source market, development, and security signals into an explainable 0-100 trust score.

Agentic workflow Scoring pipeline API-backed UI

Materials ML

Thermoplastic Elastomer Predictor

Forward and inverse ML models for polymer stress-strain prediction, paired with Bayesian optimization to guide performance-oriented material design.

Scientific ML Bayesian optimization Inverse design

Interactive Systems

Game AI and ML Experiments

Interactive AI experiments spanning path finding, reinforcement learning, and gameplay behaviors in visually demonstrable environments.

About Snapshot

Bridging research, engineering, and product delivery

My background started in chemical engineering and evolved through semiconductor process engineering, machine learning research, and software-focused graduate study in computer science.

What I bring

I build systems that connect data pipelines, model development, and user-facing delivery, so research ideas can become usable internal tools or product features.

Current focus

Machine learning engineering, data-driven experimentation, model evaluation, and interfaces that make outputs easier to understand and trust.

Working style

Fast iteration, technical ownership, and a bias toward moving from experimentation to deployable demos, prototypes, and working software with measurable value.

Skills

Technical Skills

Languages Python, SQL, JavaScript, HTML/CSS
Machine Learning PyTorch, scikit-learn, supervised learning, anomaly detection, reinforcement learning, Bayesian optimization
Data & Scientific Computing Pandas, NumPy, data analysis, data visualization, scientific modeling, experimentation workflows
Backend & Product FastAPI, API integration, automation, LLM apps, product prototyping
Tools Git, GitHub, Jupyter, model evaluation, workflow design
